uniform.description: Equal spread of tokens across N bins around active price

concentrated.description: Tight spread (1-3 bins) for high capital efficiency
concentrated.best_for: tight range, high fee capture, requires active monitoring

bid_only.description: Token Y in bins below active price — buy wall strategy

ask_only.description: Token X in bins above active price — sell wall strategy

notes: All operations default to DRY_RUN=true for safety.
LP_GLOBAL_DISABLE=true blocks ALL tx execution (kill switch).
Safety thresholds enforced: max wallet %, max USD, slippage ceiling.
require_dry_run_first: must DRY_RUN=true within 1hr before live execution.
Auto-compound not yet implemented — manual fee collection via collectFees.ts.
Rebalance trigger: when active bin drifts N bins from position center.
